name: Email Welcome
description: Tiny demo of the SMTP executor backend. A HumanTask collects {name, email}; an AutomatedStep with backendType=smtp renders Tera templates against the intake form data and sends a welcome email. Pair with `just dev mailhog-up` to capture the message at http://localhost:8025 without a real SMTP server. Requires an SMTP resource named `mail` (host: localhost, port: 1025, blank username/password — matches mailhog defaults) in the workspace at /resources.
